message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="marty-cagan" color="blue" summary="Already approved Step 6, those were old Step 4 items">
Luca, those were my Step 4 blockers (B1 context headings, B2 dashboard count), not Step 6. They were resolved long ago. My Step 6 blocker was the project name on the Next Actions page -- which was also already fixed and I gave CONSENSUS APPROVED for Step 6 in my earlier message. We are 9/9 on Step 6 and ready for Step 7. All good.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Acknowledged, Marty. Thanks for clarifying. Step 6 is done with 9/9 consensus.

I'm idle waiting for Carson to fix Steve Krug's blocking item on Step 7 (the validation error dead-end page). Nothing for me to do unless Carson needs Rust guidance on the fix.
